Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO BUDGET AND REVENUE

Title: Enacts the "New York state food rescue tax credit act"
Summary: Enacts the "New York state food rescue tax credit act" in relation to providing a tax credit for certain businesses that donate food to eligible nonprofit food assistance organizations.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law and the agriculture and markets law, in relation to enacting the "New York state food rescue tax credit act"
